Zombie Night Terror

Command a zombie horde to infect all humans across challenging 2D side-scrolling levels. Use DNA points to activate powerful mutations like Overlord (guide zombies), Exploder (destroy walls), and Runner (boost speed). Convert humans to grow your horde, destroy obstacles to create paths, and overcome defensive hazards. Win by infecting all humans, but lose if your entire horde is eliminated. Strategic mutation usage and careful planning are key to spreading the infection!

Arrow Keys: Pan camera left/right | Space: Select zombie at cursor | Z: Cycle mutations | Shift: Apply mutation | Enter: Start game | ESC: Pause/unpause | R: Restart
